title: Gunpowder+
body:
Gunpowder+ Makes the Gunpowder More usefull and make it craftable.  
Mod Stuff:  
Gunpowder Block; Burns very quickly, made with 4 gunpowders in a 2x2 crafting  
Dynamite; Makes an small explosion, made with 4 iron covering an gunpowder in the middle.  
Saltpelter; Generates in Sand and Sandstone at any Y cordinates.  
Sulfur; Generates in the same level as Redstone  
Gunpowder Crafting; Put 1 Sulfur, 1 Saltpelter and 1 Coal formless in the crafting grid.  
New Creative mode Tab;  
And new TNT Crafting;  
Credits:  

EleReeNe (aka fran6)
